I was very unhappy to see that half of the cans in the package were not the brand that I ordered but Instead were unnamed cans that just read "96% beef".  I've ordered this product before and it was fine, but this time was very disappointing.

I was SO EXCITED to discover a way to decrease the sugar content in icing/frosting...I have a wholesome baking company and now feel a bit better about offering products I do with glaze or frosting - this isn't as low calorie as the regular or brown ideal, but still way lower (344 cals per cup vs. about 768 cals per cup of regular powdered sugar)...I would recommend half and half for icing - a different taste slightly than reg., but NOT bitter at all...Even at half and half you'd be at 550 cals per cup... if using a drizzle of glaze, could go with just this product...mixed it with milk, vanilla, and dark unsweetened cocoa powder - YUM!
This is great flour but who in their right mind would pay $54 for 30lbs of flour, plus another $45 for shipping? You can buy a 5lb bag of this flour at any grocery store for less than $4.

Hi. I had to amend a previous review for this item because I only gave it 2 stars back in July 27, 2009.

I've decided to give the chips another try, and after eating them for about a month now. I'm used to the taste now. Because of a few health issues I had to change my entire diet around by incorporating more low sodium or salt free items. I've noticed that since doing this I can actually taste the flavor in these chips. I can taste the corn and it's really good. I also like eating them with homemade salsa. That gives them a extra bit of kick while adding flavor and texture.

So since I couldn't adjust my star rating from 2 to 4 I just deleted my previous comment altogether. These aren't for people who are use to a ton of sodium in their snack treats, but give them a chance and help your heart while you're doing this.

I would say the gefilte fish is five stars quality but one bottle was broken. I left massage to amazon packing people but with on response to me. As I did not know it was broken so the fish source was dropping around on my carpet upon my kitchen. This packing was so out of my imagination. It was over sized box without a proper cushioning. So the cans and glass bottles in conjunction to empty space composed a perfect rattling. My lesson to learn here was that I shall never combine the glass bottle and can in one order.

I have used this product for many years, and find it to be the most flavorful,and the purest vanilla available on the market today.

Compare cookies made with this vanilla, and the same cookies made with grocery store vanilla. You will be unable to miss the superior quality!

It can be quite expensive, but this pack of 8 bottles is nicely priced...PLUS- it qualifies for free PRIME 2nd day shipping!

I purchased the black garlic to see if it would lower my cholesterol as touted by Dr. OZ. I've been taking it now for quite sometime and have to admit, its working. Granted, I'm doing other stuff like no fried foods and the like but my level has been lowered 20 points. I started to give this product a lower rating due to the fact you have to peel the garlic before use. It's a messy process but its one I chose and its not the sellers fault. Just the way it is. Next time I plan on ordering black garlic already cleaned. You folks with high cholesterol should give it a try, you just might be surprised. Oh by the way, if you try this garlic, remember what it is. Its garlic that's been fermented, so don't expect a flavor of ice cream and be sure to have something to wash it down. Pretty tough stuff. No wonder it works. Tastes like medicine.

This granola tastes great on it's own as well as being used as cereal. You can taste the honey slightly but it is not too much or too little. This is great if you are trying to change your snacks to a healthier substitute.
This product arrived on time.  My wife loves these but they are sometimes hard to find in the stores.  Costco offers them for less when they have them which is not often.
My husband pays a lot of attention to what he has every day. He really likes them as snacks during work breaks or before workouts.

This product was a nice find. You still get the protein of peanuts but dont get so much fat. I found that it really works nice in receipies and is much easier to mix into things rather than regular peanut butter.

It is a little expensive so I would like to be able to get a better deal if you bouht two or three at a time though.

Unless the purpose of this cereal is that it be a vehicle for milk, I'm confused as to why anyone would choose this over a healthier, less sugary breakfast food. The first ingredient is chocolate filling, and the filling's first ingredient is sugar. Then the next ingredient is sugar. You get the idea.
By making the "serving size" 3/4 cup, a "serving" of this cereal is only 120 calories, but clearly most bowls would hold twice that, at least, and most of them are from the sugar--there is almost no protein in this cereal. The impressive array of vitamins and minerals could be obtained from a less-sweet enriched cereal or a one-a-day vitamin pill.
My 2 boxers loved these bones. The only negative is that the bones don't last long. My dogs ate them up in 1 day....better stock up!

Muir Glen's Cabernet Marinara is one of the best pasta sauces around. While pasta sauces tend to be sweet, this one is savory with its Cabernet undertone. One wonders if this marinara could be even more Italianate with Sangiovese, Barbera, or a Super Tuscan blend. It's a rich sauce,and would be a great contrast to a cucumber salad with a vinegar sauce. This Cabernet marinara also pairs well with Parmesan. This sauce serves as a template--one could add chicken, tuna,sausage. It's very versatile. This Washingtonian sauce gives a taste of the Wine Country!

First off it's false advertising for Amazon to say you are saving 92%. This is simply 8 Gerber Grabbers, like you would buy in the store. The only difference is, these cost 14 cents more an ounce than they cost me at Safeway. And they are even less at Target.

As for the product itself, my son loves them and I buy many of them at target.
My grand daughter had somne when she was in Florida visiting me and so I sent her some for when she got back home to Leetonia, Ohio....She said they were really good...

I guess you get what you pay for... I thought I'd give this a try since it's cheaper than the big-name cider K-cups, but it was a waste of money.  I would hardly even call it cider.  It has a very weak cider flavor, but a sickeningly strong artificial sweetener flavor.  It really tastes bitter and leaves a bad aftertaste.  I hate to throw things away, so I guess I'll save the rest of the K-cups for sometime when I'm really desperate!  Would definitely not buy again!
I did genuinely get a subscription to these bars. you get a full case, and its cheaper than if you were to buy at the grocery store. pretty awesome.
Taste great. Better for you. Is even good in coffee. I use it on waffles, pancakes, cereals that need a little sugar, cornbread.

This is not good, it's not sweet and it is loaded with fat and calories. It barely even tastes like coconut. It is bland, and greasy. Maybe if you are seeking some sort of health benefit you could convince yourself to eat this....but, if you like regular food, this isn't something you will want in the cupboard.

I hesitated to post a review because I see anyone who gives this product a bad review gets lots "not helpful" votes.(funny,huh?)I just hate to see someone order this thinking it is a delicious treat.

Great size for the occasional user who must have this for 'exotic' recipies like baklava (used Foodnetwork's Alton Brown recipie).  About the same amount as a soda can, it should be more than sufficient for those once-in-awhile concoctions.

These tinnie greenies make the perfect "out the door" bribe for my Cavlier King Charles Babies. I think they almost look forward to me going to work now. Barkley is 21 lbs & Gypsy is 18 so while they are a bit larger than the recommended size for the product it really works out perfectly helping keep the pounds off.

Having shopped around, you are saving about ten dollars by ordering from Amazon rather than going into a big box pet store.
These noodles are fine and a bit textured when cooked. That is because it is brown rice. It would be good for a gluten-free diet. White rice noodles are more bland in flavor.

I bought this because I'm grasping at straws. I was diagnosed with CLL (leukemia) in the latter half of 2010. Everyone that cares had all sorts of remedies to recommend. This was one of them. It, along with the other homeopathic remedies has done nothing to arrest the condition. My counts continue to rise (into abnormal range). Will it work for you? Some swear by this product as helpful. My suggestion: Buy three bottles. Take the recommended dosage "religiously" on a daily basis until you have completely depleted the supply. Have monthly blood tests. If you notice an improvement, bravo. If you don't, then you are only out about $20. Is your life worth that? I hope so.

Update October 20, 2011: I finished all the product I had purchased and reordered 3 more boxes. I still have not realized any improvement, in fact, my last blood test came back the highest (worst) it has ever been, by a considerable leap. Still it is the ONLY thing I am doing with any consistency and it gives my wife a sense that I am not giving up on myself. However, personally, my results cannot testify in favor of this product.

I received a shipment last night and opened it up.  I thought I was buying "Powdered Chicken Broth" and "Powdered Beef Broth", just like the names of these product claim to be.  Much to my dismay, I turned each bag over to discover that they are vegan AND contain HVP or HPP (MSG).  I wasn't looking for vegan and I certainly don't want MSG.  Too bad the "detail" pages for these products don't contain the ingredients or I never would have ordered them.  Glad I only got 1 of each to try out.  Apparently I should have gone to the vendors web site to check for ingredients first.  Aside from that, it took about 3 weeks for this to arrive.  I guess I'm just spoiled by quick service elsewhere.  I won't be ordering from these folks again.

There may be a need to start a 12-step program for this coffee. :)

I do not usually like flavored coffees but I am so glad that I tried this one.
We absolutely love YummyEarth Lollipops. My son is gluten free and dairy free and I ordered these soon after we started his diet. He particularly likes the grape, but all of the flavors are yummy.

I love the Coconut Cocoa tea, so I was excited to try this one, even though it was listed at about four dollars more than I paid for the other.  This was a nice cup of tea, but despite brewing/steeping at directed, I don't get any chocolate flavor from it.  I'll drink it, but won't be buying another can, especially at $10.69.

I use this salt for this Kalua Pig In A Slow Cooker recipe I found, and man is it delicious. 4 pound pork butt, 1 tablespoon of this salt, and 2 tablespoons liquid smoke. Put it in a crockpot/slow cooker for 20 hours, and you have one of the simplest and most delicious dishes ever. I used regular sea salt my first time cooking it, but then ordered this to try it the "real" way, and it was even better.

I bought these to make favors for a baby shower and they are perfect!
The theme of the baby shower is birds and bees.
I have put tea light candles in the shape of birds and bees on top, and added ribbon with bees onto them.
They are beautiful!

This is a great product.  It tastes great and the price is right.  Although some say that Nestle's low cal. hot choc. (25 calorie product) is better than Swiss Miss's, nobody can argue that this particular product wipes the others away...if you're not overly calorie conscious, this hot choc. is the one for you...no sugar and great taste...can't go wrong with that....

Green tea really does make one feel good. I'm surprised at the subtle changes in my body that came with a regular diet of tea. It does not taste good by itself and has a bit of a bitter taste, but it tastes great with a bit of Sweet n' Low or as iced tea. You can make several cups of tea from one tea-bag, so you can make yourself at least a couple of nice mugs of tea and use just one bag a day, though the second or third cups will require longer to steep. Overall a good tea with great antioxidants and cleansing properties.
Everyone in my house loves these treats. They are easy to break into smaller pieces and the big tub lasts FOREVER in my house.

I gave it a 4 since I am not usually fond of  plain long grain brown rice, but make an exception for this.  I still like their short grain better, but this was very good.  Barry Farms have a lot of organic foods in their online cataloge and I really appreciate that!

Royal Canin Dry Dog Food, Labrador Retriever 30 Formula, 30-Pound Bag

I've never written a review before, but you need to know this.

After several years of many visits to the vet for hot spots and skin problems, with the usual prescriptions for antibiotics and steroids, Royal Canin Labrador Retriever formula saved the day. To top it all off, he likes it and hasn't had any skin problems for the last 5 years.

After trying many different dental chews that ended up being thrown away because my dogs hated them...I found Check-Ups at Costco and my dogs love them and beg for them!!
Then Costco discontinued carrying them! I'm so glad I can get them at Amazon !
My morning cup is usually Starbucks Houseblend.  I saw this, and decided I wanted to try it.  So I ordered online.  This is similar to house blend, but stronger.  Makes a good cup of coffee.

Can not find them locally yet. Much better than baked!! Only 100 calories per bag. Get the variety pack so you can decide which you like best. I think the vinegar salt, sour cream onion, and the barb-q are the best. Shipping is very fast.
My dogs love, love, love this chew toy. They enjoy regular nylabones but this one offers a little something different.

grandma cookies arrived on time! but did not last a long time. my grand kids enjoyed the cookies as much as I did. they was simply delicious and very fresh! I recommend this product if you like bulk items this is a sure great deal.

This is not very expensive compare to other brands, grain-free, my 3-year old cat goes crazy over it! It looks like canned  tuna with chicken gravy. Just started feeding him his second car, let's see if it'll improve my cat's health

My cat will be 16 years old this year. She suddenly started losing weight and acting ill about four years ago after one of my other cats died. I took her to the vet and was told that her liver was failing and there's nothing that could be done. While shopping at a local grocery store a couple years ago, I stumbled upon Cat Sure in a bargain bin for $1 a can. I bought a couple of cans even though they had many just to try it out. I was desperate at that point to try anything since nothing else worked. Within two days, my cat showed MAJOR improvement. She had her spunk back. Well, I ran out of Cat Sure and she settled back into not feeling very well until recently when I ordered this product from Amazon/KV Vet Supply. I have been giving it to her daily twice a day since last week. She is loving it. I was having a problem with her having diarrhea and throwing up also everyday all day (before giving her the supplement). As a result, I have had to keep her confined to the kitchen. Cat Sure has gotten rid of her diarrhea and has almost kept her from throwing up. My goal is to have her keep food in her belly so that I can have her come out of the kitchen and lead a normal cat's life again. KV Vet Supply has the lowest price that I have seen for this. I have seen it elsewhere recently for $8. It's worth it, but I would rather get two for the price of one here.

If your cat is ill, don't hesitate taking them to the vet, but if the vet says there's nothing they can do...don't give up! Try this stuff!!
This coconut oil is the best - nice taste, nice flavor and really good for you!  I even give it to my cat!  Highly recommend it!

Although my kids prefer Pop Tarts, this is a healthy alternative. Believe it or not, the Apple without the frosting is pretty decent. There is cinnamon on the top of it which adds a bit of spice...I don't really like too much frosting on mine. The cherry pomengrante is the most preferred in my home. They don't last as long as opposed to the blueberry...Strawberry is delicious too. They travel pretty well too. Don't crumble too much...

Received within just a few days... Works really well! I live in Hawaii, but was unable to find it in a store in our town. I was so happy to be able to order it online, and not have to drive an hour+ to get it. Works well to minimize pores, blemishes, and leaves skin looking refreshed.
Simple...it's hard to find great tasting gluten free food, stop looking and buy these! It's a great deal and they're so yummy! Thank you!
Exp. date on case  07/MAR/ 12..........So it is not an out dated case.  Amazon did replace the case that curdled.  Thank you Amazon.

I got this specifically for use in gluten-free baking, for a low carb option. I generally stick to whole grains and nut meals for baking and wanted to use coconut flour to lighten it up a bit, change the flavor. This is the first one I've used, so I don't have a basis of comparison to other brands.

I do not bake with only this flour, but cut into others. It is a bit sweet, so I cut back on my overall sweetener in the recipe. As well, it leaves a slight coconut flavor, but not enough to interfere with the overall dish. I am very pleased with the texture and flavor.

As well, this was my first add-on purchase through Amazon. Interesting concept. No question the low price is why I got this brand, and I liked that I didn't have to buy 4 pounds of it and risk not liking it. The product and the add-on option were a good fit to try out the small quantity. Definitely recommend both.

I just spent the past 90 minutes scouring the shelves of my local grocers with the original Protein Plus formula. What on earth were they thinking with changing the formula? Caloric load went up 20%, sugar content when up 350%!!, carb content went up 36%, and fiber content decreased 40%.. Yes, fat content decreased, but it's better to have some fat with those carbs. This product, as originally formulated, was good for people on isocaloric (kinda like Zone: roughly balanced macronutrient ratios). It no longer is.

I am furious.

The black and white popcorn is great! Full of yummy flavors and a satisifing snack. The chocolate and kettle corn pieces really compliment each other.
The review before is complaining about the amount of sugar in this popcorn but the whole concept of this snack is that its "the lesser of two evils". Its not going to be 100% healthy but if you're going to snack anyway, this is the better way to go.
Also, the is my #1 favorite Gluten Free snack :)

I have liked all of the Van Houtte Kcups I have tried; except this one. Though the coffee wasn't bad in itself, I could not detect and vanilla flavor at all. Though this blend was smooth and had little to no bitterness; I expected a vanilla like flavor and detected none.
Great for making "smoked" ribs in your oven!  (But I don't think I'd ever drink the stuff)

I love that this sampler box actually comes with SO MANY samples of all different types of flavored coffees. It's exactly what I was looking for so I could try a bunch of different flavors and figure out which ones I like best. Like other reviews say, it is not a fancy gift box but if you're giving it as a gift it would be very easy to throw a bunch in a basket with creamer packs, flavored coffee liquor, coffee spoons and a mug, tie a big ribbon on the handle and give it as a gift that way. There are plenty in one box to make at least 2 of these baskets. The poster it comes with IS sort of silly but I just gave it to my niece to color on. I was only getting this for myself to try out flavors and I'm very happy with it. The price is great for this type of variety.
This is the best tea I have ever had.  It is richer and more full bodied then say a cup of lipton.  One teabag makes a nice little pot of tea.

The best jerky I've found for a low price. I'd rather have the organic/free range/etc jerky but am a poor grad student, so this stuff works for me. The best deal I can find for jerky anywhere is here on Amazon.

They are so easy to carry around and are very filling. Sometimes they are a little tougher than others, but it's not so bad you'll rip your teeth out eating them. I only have 2 complaints - a ridiculous amount of sodium and a few other additives (like SUGAR) that I'd prefer not to be eating. But still... so good for what you pay for.
This Lucky Country Licorice is some of the best we've tried. It's rich tasting, soft and not too sweet. The 15 pound bulk container was a great buy and arrived fresh at our door in just a few days.

This is a great option if you are looking for a bold roast K-Cup. This is my new favorite. Coffee People Organic used to be a favorite but they seemed to have quit making it or the new replacement is not as good.

This was by far one of the worst prepackaged meals I've had. The broccoli is almost not existant and there is little if any flavor. It just comes out as a pile of mush and no attempts to spice it up prevailed.

If you have food allergies and have a difficult time finding sweets that actually taste really good, then this is the product you need to try.  Orgran company is over the top in their ingredients and flavors.  These cookies taste like those purchased at a high-end specialty store, like a homemade teacake cookie.  The chocolate ones are also very good.  You don't have to worry about anything when you snack on these.  I'm so glad I ran across these at a health food store, and now can purchase them at such a reduced cost here on Amazon.com.  Love these.

The nuts are too hard for my teeth.  Also, delivery was made by UPS, which must have put the items on their truck in the morning but didn't deliver until 7 o'clock that evening.  By then, in the Florida heat, the chocolate coating had melted and stuck to the wrappers.  Would not order by mail again.
Best Product Out There!  Can't Eat a Gluten-Free Sandwich Without It!  Amazon Sells This at the BEST Price, Too!
I'm always waiting for packaged teas to go on sale, so I was delighted to find Stash at the subscribe and save page.  Very flavorful tea, good iced or hot.
These bags are incredible.  We use the hickory smoke bag.  The food comes out tasty, tender and with virtually no clean up.  I recommend them highly.  We love them.

This is an excellent product that I tried through our local wal-mart store.  My dogs love them.  It is one of a very select few that my dogs will eat.  We have tried every treat that comes out on the market but this one of a very few they like. I just wish they came in a larger amount.

I bought this rose water to flavor frosting for a chocolate cake. At first I wasn't sure I wanted to spend this much to try flavoring something with rose, but I am glad I did. It was excellent. A little of this goes a long way and not only does rose make a very yummy and satisfying flavor for cakes and frosting, it also has great health benefits.

Did you know rose is a soothing property to the nerves and emotional /psychological state of mind? "It is regarded as a mild sedative and anti-depressant. It is increasingly used in treatments for conditions of stress: nervous tension, peptic ulcers, heart disease, among others. There is indication that rose essence may also positively influence digestion, bile secretion, womb disorders and circulation. In addition, a tea made with rose petals (pour 150 ml of boiling water over 1 /2 grams of rose petals) often soothes a mild sore throat." ... so perhaps my rose frosting is much more of a "comfort food" than I initially thought!

So I've been searching for a jawbreaker similar to what Cracker Barrel used to carry maybe 10-15 years ago. We used to buy them on family road trips, and were upset when they stopped carrying them. I remembered them out of the blue a while ago I decided to try these. They are a perfect match! (And perfectly tasty!) Just a warning though- 5lbs is a lot- so be prepared!
The price on this tea is awesome and it's organic and great tasting to boot. I put this in an airtight container and it lasts for a very long time. I doubt I'll ever go back to tea bags again.

They had to go and change the recipe. I used to buy this in the smaller package when I would travel to work back in the early 80's. I guess they've new and improved it because it isn't the same and doesn't taste near as good.

The Crystal Light Mocktails Appletini comes with 4 packs of drink mix powder. Mix powder with 2 quarts of water, and you're good to go. I like sweet drinks, but wasn't that keen on this appletini mix. It's definitely sweet and has a bit of a tang, but I think it has a bitter aftertaste. I'd definitely prefer to drink either a real appletini or lemonade. The only way I can see myself serving this would be to pregnant girlfriends, but even then I think they'd rather skip it.

Bottom line, try an O'Doul's instead.
One of my favorites from Grove Square! A great Cappuccino that has a wonderful flavor and need no creamer to make it taste better. I love this one and the other ones from Grove Square!

I love this oatmeal, like the others I thought that at the price it would be not so good, but it is the best oatmeal I have ever had. I get it for $1 a box at Acme, but go through it so quickly I thought I would buy it in bulk. I am sorry to see that a three pack that I would pay 3 dollars for is so high. Guess I'll keep making trips to Acme for now, but let me know if the price comes down!

We were unable to find this in any of our supermarkets since April. Finally decided to order it. Service was fast and product was what we were looking for. For any of you who have never tried this, it makes mongolian beef better than any chinese restaurant.

I love this oatmeal because it has the most protein of any oatmeal out there. I love the cinnamon flavor best, tho the others are great if you like banana bread and maple sugar.  I just wanted to get the cinnamon individually and this company provided it. Has been discontinued, I hear, but it's coming back--yea, Quaker.

the better to use for all your vanilla needs!

I, like so many others, think these vanilla beans are GREAT! They are moist, plump, fresh, and smell wonderful. I have already started a batch of vanilla extract. I will order these again!

I have been using Bob's Red Mill All-Natural Nut Flours for several years to bake low-carb breads and baked goods. I also use the Hazelnut flour to bread chicken, in lieu of flour.  The product is always great tasting and easy to work with.

I trust Alvita's brand because all of the teas I have tried from them are pure and excellent quality. The Raspberry leaf is no exception. The taste is mild and it works like a charm to ease menstrual cramps. A must have during your moon cycle. Good value for the price.

Also check out Yogi Woman's Moon Cycle, Herbal Tea Supplement, 16-Count Tea Bags (Pack of 6)

Got these large Greenies originally when we noticed our 60+lb Boxer mix puppies' teeth were getting a little dirty and brushing didn't too much.  We give them each one Greenie in the morning when we leave for work, they love them.  The boy gobbles it down, but his sister savors every bit.  They also keep the buildup on their teeth down quite a bit, they're not going to make them shine, but they'll keep them pretty clean!

Amazon seems to have combined the reviews for three different products here, Italian, French, and Columbian. I picked up a box of the Italian Roast at the grocery, and I really like it. It is strong and full flavored without bitterness. For hot coffee, I make the larger size cup, and the smaller for iced coffee. I checked Amazon to see if I could save money, but it looks like the same price I paid at the store ($9.99 for a box of 12).

When I was little, this was always the syrup that my Grandma had when we were at her house.  I hadn't had the Karo syrup in easily more than 20 years, so it brought back a lot of memories!  Wish it was still sold in stores around here...  very tasty!
The Heritage O's are way too hard. Although my dogs like them (all 12 of them), I'm going to stick with the Heritage Flakes. They don't get soggy either and my teeth are much safer.
I must eat gluten & sugar cane & dairy free.  These bars allow me to avoid my allergies and they taste delicious.  I eat at least one every day.

I like the flavor of this tea.  It is not subtle in any way.  The lemon coupled with ginger provides a very drinkable and somewhat stomach soothing combination.  My little kids think the ginger is a little bit spicy but they will also drink it.
Sensible Foods Sweet Corn is by far the best thing I've ever eaten. It satisfies the sweet and salty taste you need. It travels extremely well and because it's healthy you can forget any guilt.
I really like this coconut water, but I was surprised that per 17oz box it's the same price at Wegman's.  Probably won't be ordering again unless there's some sort of discount.

I sure love chai tea and I was not dissapointed!!! It was just perfect! I brewed it on the 8oz setting like they recomended and I loved every drop! This I will buy always! I plan on brewing it,cooling it and putting it over ice in the summer!

While I discovered this product through Amazon, I purchased it through their website so that I'd be sure to receive a free sample (also saved 1 penny!). Sorry Amazon, I still love you! Amazon is a better deal if only ordering one or two of their products.

This jerky FAR exceeded my expectations. It's not too peppery nor is it too sweet. They balanced the flavors PERFECTLY! The flavors don't taste artificial as can be the case with some products. There's a subtle sweet honey flavor in the background, with a stronger peppery taste in the foreground. Just DELICIOUS!

The beef itself is not too moist, nor too tough when chewing. The consistency is perfect. It even looks appetizing, the pieces not being thick and clunky, nor too thin. They really nailed this product.

I purchased this to eat when I'm working late and need a quick snack. Considering the price, I'd planned to save it for when I really needed it. It's already gone, including the other flavors I ordered. It's THAT good!

BUY SOME!
Simply the BEST mayo around! Hellmann's / Best Foods is awesome! Taste better than any mayo out there!!!

I love popcorn, I love cheese, and both together can be awesome. But not this! This doesn't taste like popcorn or cheese. I can't believe they released this to market, it is truly horrible!!! Don't waste your time, taste or money!!!

Because they have to chew it up, less barfing.  Have also noticed less stinky poop.  The cats seem to love it also, and I have six.  A little spendy is the only fault I can find with this product.  It is the same price in the local feed store, but they don't keep the stock up.  With free shipping from Amazon, just as easy to get it here.
Tasted artificial, weird, unnatural.  Could not detect the orange peel "note" at all.  Singular, not balanced.  Very pretty color and pleasant aroma. Unfortunately, I sent it back ):

I put a pinch of this in the scratching mat and my kitten, who previously wouldn't use the mat, scratched her paws on it. That's not all, she also rubbed her cheeks against the mat. I am delighted to see that the product works and I would say it is worth every penny.

i was really surprised when i tried this - it tastes amazingly close to real eggnog, even when i used nonfat dry milk. it has exactly the same texture as real eggnog, and the flavor is very good. a fantastic bonus is that it has zero fat, but you'd never know it when you drink it - you'd swear it was the real thing. if you like eggnog as i do, you have to try this.

Some people like a strong cup of coffee that kicks them in the mouth first thing in the morning, but I don't, so I tried one classified light roast, which was a little too weak for me. I tried Nantucket Blend, and it is perfect! It's not weak at all and had a really delicious flavor to it, what I think a good cup of coffee should taste like. It is so smooth, not a single negative thing about it except that now I go through it so quickly!
This is my favorite one so far, and has become my morning drink every day!
If you like coffee and are looking for a not too strong, not too weak blend give this a try!

where am I; heaven????? boy is this chocolate the most fabulous I have ever tasted in my life; can I get a monthly chocolate membership for this?

I am now spoiled; will never buy a chocolate bar at the market again!!!!!

I was not such a big fan of the taste of this tea, but I have to admit that the convenience provided in the concentrated little bottle is a big plus. You can take it and flavor your water wherever you go and it fits easily into a purse or pocket. I do prefer the taste of Arizona iced tea powders, though--but those require making larger batches of tea at a time. The biggest drawback of the MIO tea is the ingredient list--it's got propylene glycol (anti-freeze) and artificial colors --which I try to avoid.
The ingredient list is as follows: water, malice acid, propylene glycol, citric acid, and less than 2% of natural flavor, sucralose and acesulfame potassium, potassium citrate, red 40, yellow 5, blue 1, potassium sorbate. And despite it saying "natural flavor with other natural flavor" on the front--you'll have to note that on the back it says 0% juice.

This is a really good product for vegetarians. I like this because it is a bit sweet - not overwhelmingly so - but fun to eat, dip chips in this, or add it to chili to have fun with your beans! It also tastes good on top of a hotdog, with or without chili. Mmm!

My kids love this stuff. I only had one problem with disintegration and I think it was because I used cold water. When I use room temp water and allow the mixture to soak at room temp I had no problem. Yum!

Overall I prefer a stronger coffee than Gloria Jean's Butter Toffee, but I tried this coffee when in an accountants office and really liked the flavor.  It is not a K-Cup that I drink every day, but it is definitely good for a change of pace.  If it were a little stronger I would rate it five stars.

I have ordered this before BUT with this order, one tin was opened and the powder emptied into the box!! Plus there was no tamper resistant mechanism on the tin AND it was stamped "tamper evident".  SO rather than chance it, I threw them all away along with the money I spent!

I have a wheaten terrier (medium-size dog) and bought the large size since his mouth is bigger - it works great as a game, treat, and way to get him to slow down eating his food.  It's held up great as far as wear and tear and I've had it for about 3 months now and use it all the time.
What a bargain! Who would ever buy those little jars of yeast again if they knew about this deal! I bagged and froze mine. It comes in a vacume sealed package for semi long term storage :)

Great product. Tastes amazing. I am in love with this salt and will definitely get more. I got the salt at a great sales price. I did think the shipping was a bit steep but I don't often ship a "pound" of something. I kind of felt the shipping was making up the sales price but maybe it was justified. Overall happy with the product.

My husband and I are great appreciators of Brazilian culture, enjoying the TV Globo cable channel for several years now with its novelas and live Carnaval broadcasts.  We were delighted when Macy's had a Brazilian promotion a couple months ago, and purchased a couple bags of this Pilao coffee, which Macy's charmingly packaged in little burlap coffee sacks.  We like a medium-strong coffee, and one of our favorites is Starbucks Colombian which is less bitter than most of their varieties (to us, not everyone), and this Pilao is very similar to that but slightly stronger with no bitter aftertaste.  I agree with most reviewers in that it is too strong for all-day drinking, but for that morning eye-opener it is just about perfect, and adds a little Brazilian samba to your day!

I had to try these for my family. I love that they are organic and made with all real ingredients!! Our kids love them and so do we. I can't say that they're MAGICALLY better than every other lollipop I've ever tasted, but their ingredients win me over when it comes to choosing a "healthier" sweet option for my kids. I'm always trying to stress to them that there is candy out there that isn't full of dyes and chemicals. You don't have to poison yourself to enjoy something special. If you're gonna have a sweet treat... these are great! My ratio of flavors (and I bought them "Ships from and sold by Amazon" under IN STOCK) was:

17 x pomegranate
20 x mango
33 x cherry
36 x grape
42 x sour apple
44 x blueberry
52 x watermelon
75 x strawberry

So... not TOTALLY even, but I still got a nice assortment. I only felt cheated on the mango because they're my favorite of the bunch. Luckily we also love strawberry! Nice lollies.
These bars are very tasty and contains less calories and sugar than bars from other companies. They are not very chewy or very crunchy.
These Jerky treats are my 2 dogs favorite dogs treat. I found that if I reward them with this treat, I can motivate them to learn or do anything!
I purchased Emeril's Bold for a vacation with 14 people.  For the person who wants a stronger flavor Emerils is just right. I would purchase this again.

These chips are a regular in my house now.  In fact they are the only chips I buy.  The BBQ flavor is my favorite.  I buy these in single serving packs because if I buy a bigger bag, it is too hard to stop eating them.
These Ultimate Cran-Orange Energy Bars are tastey!  A serious treat that doesn't kill my diet. I keep them at home, in my desk and purse.

I remember these being sweeter than the larger ones oddly. But I recently had the regular size and these and they both seem a tad on the salty side. I don't seem to enjoy them as much as I once did. I guess my tastes changed more than I thought. Or maybe the recipe? I just don't find them as delicious as I once remember them being. Still its a good product since they seem to be almost gone. Family still enjoys them.

I have to say I too was one with quick fingers that chose this product before I was aware it was for ethnic hair. I'm sure that it's good for the right hair type but after opening the jar I knew there was no way this product would work with my hair but I do have extremely dry skin and had other ideas that it works great for.
When the humidity leaves the air in the fall I develop scaly dry patches on my wrist and hand (from washing my hands too much). A small amount of this rubbed into the area took care of the problem. It leaves a waterproof coating over the area and takes many hand washings to remove it. It protects the skin really well.
I also coat my feet in this and place a pair of socks on overnight and it leaves my feet soft and smooth and its also cheaper than buying foot lotion and smells better.
Overall it's a product that can have many uses if you make the mistake of purchasing for the wrong hair type and don't want to waste it.

Oatmeal and raisins are healthy, right? Put them in cookie form and I've tricked my little toddler into a healthy snack that she thinks is a treat. These were really soft and flavorful. Definitely would buy again.

these are great
they are healthy snacks and they taste great and they feel like a cheese puff in your mouth i love it

The soda is very refreshing(I got the strawberry) and the bottle is very fun to open(but i can see being a hassle with future openings), but the price is way too much for some foreign soda. So if I were you, I would try to find a local asian market(found out a little late that there is one near me and I never noticed it, Stupid me) and see if they have it or any store that sells foreign stuff.

I think all diets I've tried say "drink at least six or eight glasses of water a day". The problem is I HATE water out of it's natural habitat. I've tried all the tricks and can usually make it for a week or so then I slide back to getting my daily quota of water from a cup of coffee. I already drink sugar-free soda and I don't know what real peach tea tastes like so I don't have any negative comparisons. I use just enough of the MIO to kill the taste of the water and I like it so far. I'm hoping the positive hydration will out-weigh the intake of more artificial sweeteners.

Afterthought: This is a "water flavoring" , nothing more. No juice, no nutritional value. Don't expect something like iced tea or Kool-aid. It just adds a subtle taste to your water. If you're used to diet soda and artificial sweeteners you won't mind the taste. My sample had a non-removable label over the ingredients so you will have to check other reviews for that.

Mild and rich at the same time, this coffee is everything the product description says it is. And it's organic to boot!

Now my breakfast will be more than a necessity. It will be a delight.

There are no vegetables in this food.

Cesar has repeatedly stated that his entire goal in coming to the United States was to go to Hollywood and be famous. I think that that focus on fame (and money) is apparent in his approach to dog food: Give crummy food nice packaging and an appealing name.

That one's dog will eat it is no advertisement. First, the only thing one really has to do to sell dog food is make it so the dogs will eat it. That the dog will eat it is no measure of the quality or benefit of the food. Dogs eat anything--including manure, which is part of this food as the meat flavoring.

I tried this mix for the first time today and the pancakes were SO good! They have a nice texture and delicious flavor. The nutritional value is great. They have 5 g of fiber per serving as well as 6+ grams of protein depending on how you prepare them. I will purchase these again. This is just another wonderful product from Bob's. I am a huge fan of their products.

I use canned asparagus only for pureeing in soups where the lack of texture doesn't matter. I have used most every brand of canned asparagus and this is the first I've ever bought that was so stringy and woody I had to press the soup though a sieve and thereby waste a good part of it. To add insult to injury I paid a premium for it over the good house brand I usually buy, because it was low sodium.

I'll not buy it again, needless to say, and have warned my soup-making daughters about it.

I am surprised and disappointed that a reputable company like Green Giant would market a product like this. I hope the negative reviews here will be a wakeup call for them.

We bought these because they're gluten free. They're not really healthy for you, and are kind of high calorie for a snack. My daughter won't eat them. She prefers the apple cinnamon bars to there. Not bad, but not great, either.
16 oz is less priced than the one pound size...where I went to school, 16oz IS one pound...why the price difference and YES MADE IN CHINA...do not buy anything but MADE IN AMERICA!
I like the regular flavors better, but this will do and is much better not having so much sugar in it. I think I can drink this long term without becoming diabetic.(one a day)

We stumbled upon this in Vienna initially. Great as a side embellishment to any dish. Rich in flavor and very hard to find here in America. Great on Salad or in sauces for an added rich tomato flavor. Add paprika if you like spicy dishes. Also great on its own in pasta.

I must reiterate what another reviewer said.  Tasty Bite Madras lentils do taste an awful lot like beef chili, a perfect alternative for those who love chili but want a vegetarian alternative.  They also have a similar mouth feel and a nice hearty spiciness.  What they do not have is a lot of excess calories.  One can eat the whole pouch (2 servings worth) and only ingest a mere 240 calories.  That can't be beat!

You can buy these at Sam's club for around $5 for the 4-pound tub.

Crackers are great, fresh taste, sealed for freshness, great container for other things when you are done with the crackers.

These may be the best pretzels I've ever had. They're tasty AND healthy (bonus: They're organic). Good alone or with salsa, guacamole or a non-fat dips. Or add some apple or pear slices, a dollop of yogurt or some fresh veggies for a quick and healthy at-home or on the go snack.

I first came across them in a desperate attempt to wean myself from baked white cheddar chips. Looking for something crunchy yet non-fattening wasn't easy. You get 15 pretzel sticks at only 130 calories and no saturated or trans fats. Works for me!

Best of all, there's 4% dietary fiber in a serving. (About 8 servings to an 8-ounce bags, so we're talking about a week's worth of healthy snacks.)

The honey wheat flavor is great and best of all, it's a satisfying snack, too.

If you buy in bulk, be sure to hide away those other bags and count out portions. Otherwise, it's way too easy to overeat these pretzels.
This is the 2nd time I have ordered these and have been pleased with the tootsie pops and the price.  They arrived promptly also.

Awesome flavor and strength. One of the best. The only vanilla that compares would be a Tahitian vanilla, and that only if made with the same quality.
I was surprised by the price, but purchased this product anyway... and was even MORE surprised when TWO bottles arrived. I am fairly certain this isn't a mistake, but rather that the product description fails to mention that the price is for 2 bottles, not just one.

I love this coffee and so does my family.  Coconut is a favorite flavor of mine.  If you like coconut AND coffee, then this flavor is for you.  Yesterday I made it over ice to make an iced coffee and it was fabulous.

I got this three pack (qty 3) for my 11-month old French Bulldog. She loves these things, she likes to work on one end of the bone at a time and while holding it up with her front paws. I was wondering why she loved these things so I took one and actually clamped down on one (rear teeth) and realized that it had a very therapeutic effect...weird, I know. I gave it back to Coco...

For those wondering, she goes through about a bone (grinding down the ends) about every 2 weeks. I order a bunch and place them in a "jar" and place it in her room. She knows when to ask for a new one...

I've been buying various brands of tahini for decades, and this stuff is by far the best tasting I've ever found. It's delicious even before adding anything.

In shipping, one bottle developed a crack and leaked tahini all over the other bottles, as well as the box it was in. Tahini being what it is, the result was quite a spectacular mess! However, as soon as I informed Amazon they immediately overnighted a replacement shipment. And with some cleanup the three other bottles were fine. :)

Gotta love that.

This is my favorite "Asian food in a box" product.  Per the instructions, I add a half pound each of sliced chicken and fresh vegetables to the mix.  One box is plenty for 2 people and the flavor is rich, but not too spicy.  There is a different "Thai Pavilion Garlic Chili" product that is much spicier.  If you don't add meat or vegetables to this product, I can imagine how the spices might get out of balance.

Found this item and was thrilled.  This candy was a holiday favorite for years at my parent's home, but has not been available for some time.  I'm so very pleased with the quality of this candy.  Just as we remember!

I have used Stevia packets for a long time and they work beautifully in warm beverages. But, with the beginning of summer, I found that they didn't mix as well in iced tea.  So I bought these drops. They are a convenient size to carry in my pocketbook. I find the taste of the liquid a little different than the powdered product, but it may just take me time to get used to it and to figure out just how many drops to use. If you are a Stevia user I urge you to try it to see how it works for you and don't give up with the first try. You may find that adjusting the amount will make it just right and it will mix so much easier in cold drinks.

I use to get my dogs bully sticks at a local pet store but they moved. The other pet stores that carry them charge more and they didn't like them very much. I just ordered these for the first time and they were delivered yesterday. I have seen some that are extremely thin so I was glad to see that these were a decent size. They did smell pretty bad when I first opened the package but since then they have aired out and I don't notice them much. I've bought other ones that have smelled far worse. My dogs liked these ones so I would definitely recommend.
This has got to be the all time leader in snack foods! This box packs plenty of Slim Jim snackism! HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!!!

These are SICK! I bought barbeque flavored almonds and chili/lime flavors just to distract others while I eat these amazing nuts. Well done, Blue Diamond!

Enjoy!

A few weeks ago we had a picnic party where several couples had kids who did not like fresh fruit. We purchased Mandarin Orange fruit cups (and Del Monte Cherry Mixed Fruit Cups - 16/4 oz. cups) as an option for desert hoping to please them. I am happy to report they they liked the fruit cups!

Mandarin Oranges was the favorite choice with both kids and adults, at the end of the day there were no Mandarin Orange cups left (there were a few Cherry fruit cups left). I drink this tea almost everyday with a bit of lemon. It never fails to satisfy. I used to drink straight green tea but the grass-clipping flavor eventually began to nauseate me.  I'm glad to have found this tasty alternative.

This is great.  My two, older adopted cats, are strictly indoors.  I start a quarter cup of seeds every 3 months or so, and they love the fresh greens.  If I get behind on schedule, they try to eat houseplants, which is dangerous.  It starts easier than the package suggests.  You do not have to go the dark, covered route.  Just keep it misted.  When the seeds sprout, they take off on their own.  I put a rubber band over the pot, so the grass can grow great and the cats can't get too excited and steal the entire plant. If you don't secure the planting, the cats will take it out of the container.

It is so wonderful to use my bread machine again and have the smell the aroma of fresh baked bread.  The taste far exceeded my expectations.  I woofed it down so fast that I don't recall tasting any difference from any of the non-gf breads I used to make before diagnosis. I did not even care that it fell during the baking process (supposed to create a 2 lb. loaf and I made it in my 1 1/2 lb. machine and it was less than that after falling). I read somewhere that someone else had this problem and added a little extra yeast and it had worked.
I LOVE this stuff!!!  Unfortunately, I can no longer find it in the stores.  I also FINALLY got my picky kids to try it, and they, too think it's AMAZING!!!  DELICIOUS!!!

These awesome chips get their flavor from actual jalapeno bits and crushed red peppers.  There is a world of difference between this product and Dorito-type chips that have flavor merely sticking to the surface.  For the health-conscious, these chips have three grams of fiber per serving.  The beet powder gives these chips a red-hot appearance, however they are not too hot.  This product is healthy thanks to the fiber grams, plus it tastes great.  Highly recommended.

I served this wonderful cake at a Christmas party at my house.  As the only celiac in the crowd, I decided to wait until the others had tried it, before revealing that it was gluten free.  Everyone raved over the great taste!  The package included directions for making the mix into a carrot cake, which is how I served it.  My own two boys said it was the best cake I had ever made, including the traditional wheat flour cakes I sometimes make for the rest of my family.  It was moist, spicy, and rich.  It reminded me of the cakes my grandmother made when I was growing up, and she was a terrific cook.  I highly recommend this one!

This is a great coffee for hazelnut-flavor lovers.  It's a mild, medium bodied brew.  When I add sugar-free hazelnut creamer to this coffee, I don't even need any sugar.  The bulk price on Amazon is great right now.

I have been purchasing these chews for our two American Eskimo dogs (miniature and a toy) for years. My dogs really enjoy them, as soon as I go for the package they become excited. One thing to watch out for: particularly thick chews. Usually there are 2-3 chews that are thicker than the rest and very hard. I didn't catch this and one of my dogs broke one of their teeth on it. I still buy them, but I go through the entire bag and remove the thick ones.

OKay, I must admit I'm reviewing this because somehow the idea of reviewing COFFEE seems ridiculous and funny and sort of pretentious, like those people who get into the subtle, indiscernible differences in wines. So I"m going to act like a real connoisseur of coffee and tell you that, yes it's BOLD, with subtle notes of . . . . of . . . well, of caffeine! OH, I can't even pretend to be a connoisseur. Enjoy!
My dogs absolutely love this dog food. According to my vet this is one of the best brands and selections you can get. I will keep buying this dog food over anything else.

Tinkyada Brown Rice Elbows with Rice Bran, 16-Ounce Packages (Pack of 12)
Tinkyada brown rice pasta in any shape is excellent! Tastes like the "real thing", never soggy or mushy, it's user-friendly to those of us that tend to stay away from wheat products and it's nice to be able to have pasta again. I tend to buy in the "mister bulk size" like the twelve pack here because I have hungry teenagers in the house. This pasta goes great with any sauce you choose to pair it with. You will be happy with this pasta!
These were a huge hit at the train birthday party that was held for my 3 year old grandson. I would suggest them to anyone that is looking for something extra in a kids party.

My 10-month-old loves these, and I do too.  With a little help holding the pouch she can drain one of these pretty quickly through the straw cap so we don't need to worry about bowls and spoons when we are out. Although if you want to use a spoon, the travel spoon tip that boon makes for plum organics fits the cap on these also.  These are a little expensive for everyday, but when we are going out I love that I can just throw a couple of them into the diaper bag.  Then there is the fact that they are organic, healthy, without added sugar, and in BPA-free packaging.  And my daughter really likes the taste.  If I could give them 10 stars I would.
Very hard to find this favor in the stores, I was glad to find it.
This stuff may not be real good for you from a nutritional aspect but it sure tastes great!!  It is a wonderful occasional treat.  Emphasis here is on the word "occasional"!

After scouring the web, this offering from Amazon was about the cheapest for one pound of cardamom powder shipped from a trustworthy source. Very fragrant even before I cut open the packet fully. It comes in a sealed plastic bag covered all over by silver lining. Storing it in the freezer.

I bought this large a quantity because I add a few pinches of a spice mix that includes this powder for making indian milk tea. The spice mix contains this powder along with ginger, cinnamon, and clover powders in 3:3:1:0.5 proportion. To make indian milk tea use a 1:1 proportion for water:2% milk (for 1 cup of tea, add 1/2 cup water and 1/2 cup milk). Add this mix to water prior to boiling then just when it begins to boil add 1 teaspoon (mounted) black tea power and bring it to a boil for 1 minute. Pre-heat the milk in the microwave and then add to the boiled tea liquid. Mix well and filter the entire mixture using a tea filter. Add sugar if desired. I make tea about 3-4 times a day for 2 or more people, a 1 lb caradamom usually lasts a year to make my spice mix.
This product was exactly as presented and it arrived on the date stated.  I will be ordering again.  I recommend it to anyone who has loved Folgers for drip coffee makers.
These k-cups are awesome.  They taste no different (Personally, I think better) than those which are priced three times as much!  I highly recommend this product!
The meatballs are fine, but that's as good as it gets. The spaghetti is over cooked and extremely mushy and there's too much sauce!!!

My dad and I love this ice cream topping. Our local grocery store rarely has it in stock and we use a ton of it. I was delighted to find it on amazon for a cheaper price than it costs at the grocery store. With free shipping, you can't beat it!
Mmmmmm. These are the perfect size for a snack or to substitute in for a bag of chips with your lunch. Closest I have been able to find compared to what they sell direct in the Caribbean.

This is a great alternative to peanut butter. Great taste without the fat or calories.  This should be in every heath conscious pantry. a great travel food as well.  Can be easily reconstituted on an airplane, or in the office during a busy day.

I am not a coffee drinker, but my husband has a travel cup attached to his hand. This is his review:

The coffee was okay. Very flavorful.
My preferred coffee flavor is bolder along the Italian/ Colombian lines so this having a subtle hint of flower flavor was very different.
I know this will be a big hit to some coffee drinkers but it is not for me.

My Tibetin Terrior is 3 years old and has been on Wellness food since birth. I just recently found Newman's Own Organics.
The price was a bit cheaper, plus free shipping to my home! AWESOME! When I started to gradually change foods. My LIVI,
would eat only the Newmans' and leave the Wellness to later when she was really hungry. So Funny! She is the "queen" and she knows it!!

These Honey Dijon chips bring a terrific balance of salty, tangy, sweet and crunchy. Other brands I've tried use too much mustard flavor, which overpowers the Honey Dijon pairing.

These chips make a great side dish on a BBQ plate with baked beans, coleslaw or potato salad and grilled meat. Naturally, they also go down great with beer.

As an Oregonian, I'm proud to share these delectable snacks with friends, especially those living outside our state and who haven't experienced gourmet chips. I tell them Kettle Brand does for potato chips what microbrews did for beer.

Kettle Brand potato chips are unmistakable--a light gold color, rich flavor and amazing crunch. Kettle Brand chips are also a healthier snacking option than the major chip brands. Kettle Brand chips don't have trans fats, MSG or artificial flavors and colorings. The company also has a line of organic potato chips and all of their products are certified Kosher.

I also recommend these other Kettle Chips flavors: Kettle Chips Sea Salt & Vinegar and Kettle Chips Spicy Thai.

Annette Solomon, a reporter for the Salem Statesman Journal recently noted that a glass of wine goes nicely with these chips. Solomon wrote, "...you could be missing out on a wonderful pairing. These chips are spicy, so you would want to select a semi-sweet white wine. Also, a moderate amount of acid will subdue the strong flavors of ginger, lime, garlic and cilantro without over-powering them. Classically, a German-style Riesling fits these parameters perfectly."

Green tea by itself is nice, but adding brown rice gives the green tea a smoother after taste. It adds a nice nutty flavor that compliments sometimes bitter taste of green tea. Eden brand is definitely one of the better ones on the market.

We seem to eat a lot of cookie/trail/breakfast bars in our house and these were a welcome surprise. By mistake they were stored in the refrigerator and I decided to try a cold one before moving them to the regular cupboard, what a delicious surprise, it was delicious; the cold had brought out the taste and did not make it hard to bite into at all. I loved the blueberry taste and found them just sweet enough to suit my taste. They are about the same as as other similar products with similar packaging but with a great taste!
So not only do I recommend these, I suggest you put one or two in your refrigerator to see if it lights up your taste buds the way it did mine. My daughter always warms these types of bars in the microwave, she thought these were delicious that way also...
This is the best tea I have ever tasted.  An excellent choice for any tea lover. I have already purchased this product for my friends and recommended it to everyone I work with.

I placed an order for 4 separate Kringle's to go to 4 separate addresses.  One of the orders was never sent by the company.  They basically ruined somebody's Christmas gift.  A couple days after Christmas, all I got was an apology and they said they would refund the one Kringle purchase. You'd think they'd do something to make up for their mistake, especially considering how many orders I placed.  Enjoy the money you got from this years Kringle purchase, because it will be the last time I'll ever place an order there.  There are other bakeries that do mail order.  You apparently want my money more than you want my business.

Dove has to be the best chocolate that I have ever tasted.  It is just out of this world, its like eating sweet smooth silk.  I have not ordered this product from amazon but have gotten it from my local grocery store.  Dove was actually an ice cream before it was a chocolate, I had no idea.  But they are sure a winner in my book when it comes to chocolate.  The perfect little treat to end a hard day.  The dark chocolate is my favorite, and dove never lets my taste buds down.

I am a huge fan of coconut.  This candy bar is one of my favorite coconut treats.  It is not disgustingly sweet, rather it has a delicate coconut flavor.  Normally, I dislike white chocolate but with the coconut, this candy bar is amazing.  The consistency and intensity of the bar is not like a mounds bar.  This is an actual candy bar with no filling.  The coconut flavor is melded with the chocolate.  The bar is fairly large.  I typically take three to four days to eat one bar - the restraint is hard, but at 240 calories a serving restraint is necessary.  Flecks of this bar are great on ice cream but also in thicker, warmer beverages.

I just received this item. I was happily surprised to find that there are actually TWELVE different kinds of "biscuits" in the box. There are 32 in all. This is a dried noodle soup that you put the seasoning in the noodles then either put water in it and microwave for three minutes or pour boiling water over it and wait for a few moments.

The flavor was spicy chicken and I admit that I felt a little of the warmth from the spices, but didn't really taste the chicken flavor. I did like that there was green onions in with the seasoning. This was better than the usual peas and carrots that are on the top of a Cup O Noodles.

I didn't like the bowl that the soup came in. When it had hot water in it, it became really flimsy. I was afraid that the edge was going to cave in and I would get burned from the hot water.

In the end, this was basically a Cup O Noodles soup. It tasted just like a Cup O Noodles except that they seasoning package was separate and you had to pour that into the soup before messing with water.

At the moment, Amazon does not have a price listed for these so I don't know how cost effective they would be. In my opinion, I would say that the noodle soup was good and filling but take a look at the Cup O Noodles selection before deciding if you really need to order the soup from Amazon.

Another reviewer remarked that the bottle was leaking when it arrived. Same with mine. And it's a bad package design. I don't know what other guys do with their shower products, but I have a shelf in my shower that shampoo bottles and the rest go on, and this is entirely too tall and top-heavy of a bottle not to fall over in that environment. I do appreciate the one-handed snap-open lid, but it needs to be on a much squatter bottle to prevent frequent falls. I would guess it's too tall for most caddies and is not a good fit for gym bags, either.

So having attacked the packaging, I found the scent to be pleasant and just this side of too much. I expected an herbal smell, which can range from subtle and welcome to overpowering and obnoxious. With mint and green tea essences fighting it out in the formula, the smell could have been awful. But no, it's not that obtrusive and results in a sense of freshness rather than having been heavily perfumed.

The conditioner works quite well. Because my hair can become oily over the course of a day or two, I favor shampoos that are good at removing oils, but the unfortunate side-effect is that stripped hair can become damaged, fly-away, and lifeless. The conditioner in Clear Men is light enough to avoid adding to my greasy head woes, but present enough to add a little body and manageability.

I am highly doubtful that the herbs used--or indeed, any herbs--are as effective a treatment for dandruff as several non-organic compounds (notably those with sulfur and zinc compounds) are, but I do not have much of a dandruff problem to start with and generally only choose dandruff compounds as a preventative. I don't know but suspect that men with really serious dandruff issues are not going to be satisfied with the treatment afforded by largely herbal therapies. "Clear Men," however, does contain a zinc compound that I suspect does all the anti-dandruff heavy lifting, with the botanicals merely added for cache and marketing appeal.

Having said that, and setting aside the horrible packaging, it's a perfectly acceptable shampoo and I can see myself getting it again sometime--more likely if they come up with a bottle that is less like a carrot and more like a pumpkin.

I used to regularly grab various brands of granola and meal replacement bars when I was too busy to eat a proper meal, but since becoming gluten intolerant I have found myself at a loss for what to purchase. Even seemingly innocent products would have hidden ingredients waiting to make me feel miserable. Anyone who is gluten intolerant (or is allergic, or has Celiac) knows how frustrating it can be to find convenient foods, despite the growing number of food producers who are aware and clearly mark their packaging as "gluten free".

Then, thanks to the bride at a recent wedding I photographed, I found Kind bars. The almond-cranberry ones were the type she offered me as a snack while the bridesmaids were getting ready, and I found them to be a fabulous mix of flavors and have a very palatable texture (perhaps a bit on the dry side, but it's a nut bar, so have something to drink handy). The amount of fiber and protein in these bars is quite filling even with the small portion size, and there are no worries about sugar drops thanks to the low-glycemic recipe.

I highly recommend these to not just those who are gluten intolerant, but also for anyone who wants a healthy on-the-go snack that will actually sustain you until your next meal. So far I haven't been disappointing by any flavors I've tried and just ordered a few I haven't seen anywhere in stores and look forward to reviewing those as well.

I've used this yeast for quite a few years, and it is wonderful. The thing I love about it the most is that it can be mixed with the dry ingredients, then all the wet ingredients can be added after they've been heated quite hot (too hot to touch for more than a moment). This yeast can stand the heat as long as it is buffered by the other dry ingredients. I have often simplified recipes which called for proofing, or for scalding milk, then letting it cool, with this method, with great results. For example, today I made this bread:

[...]

Rather than worrying about the temperatures of the milk and water, I simply melted the butter, added the water and milk to it, and heated it until quite hot, then added it to my mixture of yeast and other dry ingredients. Works like a charm. I keep it in the freezer in a ziploc bag and it lasts for years. Highly recommended.

They're mentioned in German Medieval sources before 1200 CE and archaeological evidence suggests that wheat noodles have been a staple of Schwabian cuisine for at least 4000 years. I'm fairly convinced this is true, since most of the packaged Spaeztle I've bought in the USA taste roughly that old. The etymology of the name is obscure, but most Schwabian housewives declare that it's derived from Schwalbe, the German name for the bird swallow. Or perhaps it's the Schwabians who are derived from Schwalben because their dialect sounds like twittering. Not a single housewife of my acquaintance has been able to suggest what the connection might be, leaving me free to speculate about the possibility that Marco Polo carried a bag of Spaetzle with him on his travels to the Khanate, where his attempts to translate the German into Chinese via Italian gave the Khan's chefs the idea of making bird's nest soup, the birds in question being swallows. However, there's also the strong possibility that all Schwabians are genetically Chinese, since their profile of frequency of blood types A and B exactly matches that of certain districts of Shanghai, which would certainly demonstrate that Marco Polo never actually traveled to China but instead heard tales of the place from various German Dudelsack players who were imprisoned with him in Genoa for disturbing the peace.

In any case, Spaetzle are basically gnarly little egg noodles, usually served with meat dishes having rich gravies, when other cuisines might offer rice or pureed vegetables. Of course they're far better home made, but this brand is more than tolerable. There's a description of how Spaetzle are made on wikipedia, written in astounding detail, and you'll find recipes for appropriate saucy dishes on-line or in any German cookbook.

They barely touched the indoor cat food, while eating most of their kitten food. I ended up having to mix some canned cat food in with it to get them to eat.

Don't be discouraged, though. My cat can't tell the difference between the kitten food and the regular adult food. They really enjoy Science Diet's fish flavored food, so give that a try.

Coffee Bean Direct has a couple of versions of this coffee and all are good. I tried the dark house blend and found it to be just a little too close to that "not quite burned" flavor for which a famous national coffee house chain is noted. This medium house blend strikes just the right note for a general purpose all around coffee.

Every order I have placed has seen bags of fresh beans of good quality, consistent size and even medium-dark full city+ roast arrive at my door. Beans are roasted to the point where there is just a small amount of oil evident on their surface. These beans are much less likely to clog your grinder than many darker more oily roasts.

The flavor is dark (but not too dark), rich and full bodied. The mouth feel in the cup is very good, thick and velvety, not thin. Ground coarsely this blend is excellent for French press. Go a little finer and it makes a great pot of drip coffee. Run it through a decent burr grinder and go fine enough and it also makes an excellent espresso with good "tiger stripe" crema that is long lived in the cup, and that same espresso makes a great base for milk-based coffee drinks like lattes and cappuccinos.

With subscribe and save you're getting a very good quality coffee for pre-ground and not so good stale grocery store coffee prices. I don't hesitate to recommend the CBD Medium House Blend. If you like your coffee dark but not too dark with low acid and deep coffee aroma and flavor, I think you'll like this blend. I know I like it very well. Five stars for quality, flavor and subscribe and save value.

I bought the tofu shirataki noodles for my son (21 yrs. old )who has autism.  He is obsessed with pasta, and I was looking for a healthier alternative for him.  I was a little skeptical given his sensory/texture issues, but I bought a bag.  I rinsed them thoroughly (3 minutes), cooked them in a bowl of water in the microwave for 1 minute, dried them thoroughly, threw them in a bowl with some leftover spaghetti meat sauce, let them sit about an hour to absorb the flavor of the sauce, then heated them in the microwave for 2 mintues.  I served it to him with some trepidation.  He added butter and parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper.  He took one bite, then another, then another, and kept going until they were gone.  He prounounced them "A-OK"!  A small miracle given his sensory/texture issues.  Needless to say, I made sure he was nowhere around when I first opened the bag b/c they did indeed have that fishy smell I had read so much about, and since he has a hairtrigger gag reflex (has to brush his teeth BEFORE breakfast or breakfast may and has come back up), I wasn't taken any chances.  Next step--I have to try them.  Yikes!!!
